ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Attendance ==
* Microsoft: Ellis Wilson, Xiaolin Zang, Cyrus Ramavarapu * Aeon Computing: Arshad Hussain * Whamcloud: Peter Jones, Andreas Dilger * Iowa State University: Shane Nehring * University of Cambridge: Gwen Dawes
== Minutes ==
Status update provided on previously assigned tasks:
* Ellis: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-535 Lustre Wiki: Review changelog, release, and event page organization] - completed review and made modifications necessary * Cyrus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-536 Lustre Wiki: Review Old/Obscure Tool or System Integration Pages] - largely completed review and opened subsequent tasks to improve or remove dated tool pages * Xiaolin: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-537 Lustre Wiki: Review Robinhood Policy Engine Page] - not yet begun * Shane: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-540 Lustre Wiki: Review ZFS Feature Pages] - not yet begun * Gwen: First meeting, so no assigned task yet
Newly picked up task to begin working for next time:
* Ellis: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-542 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Tuning Pages]
[[Category:DWG]]
